business.headline: Gautam Adani launches Rs 150 crore rural eye care initiative in BiharTogether, the Adani Centre for Eye (ACE) and Adani Training in Ophthalmic Medicine (ATOM) will create an ecosystem that will be capable of performing 3.3 lakh eye surgeries annually and training 1,000 eye care professionals every year.

The fine print behind unlimited health insurance policiesHandcrafted ByOur Editors In the first part of our series "The Unlimited Illusion", we explain how unlimited health insurance policies work, what insurers mean by "unlimited", and why the fine print matters.

CNG prices increased in Delhi-NCR by Re 1, second hike in 2 daysCNG will now cost Rs 80.09 per kg in Delhi, while consumers in Noida and Ghaziabad will pay Rs 88.70 per kg. The latest increase comes just two days after CNG prices were raised by Rs 2 per kg on Friday, resulting in an overall hike of Rs 3 per kg.

Delhi govt cuts VAT on jet fuel; move to benefit airlines, passengersDelhi has cut VAT on aviation turbine fuel from 25 per cent to 7 per cent after Maharashtra made a similar move. The step is aimed at easing pressure on airlines and passengers as global jet fuel prices climb.

Govt restricts silver bar imports, 99.9% purity category now needs permitThe Centre has restricted imports of certain silver bars, including 99.9% purity silver, with immediate effect amid the ongoing West Asia conflict.

Selective compliance, systemic exclusion: How workers are left outIn the seventh part of this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, a factory inspection from 1988 reveals how workers, though recorded for contributions, remained excluded from statutory benefits through selective and incomplete compliance.

No Claim Bonus: The motor insurance reward many drivers lose unknowinglyHidden inside every motor insurance policy is something called No Claim Bonus, or NCB, a reward insurers give customers for not making claims. Over time, it can reduce premiums significantly. Yet despite being one of the most valuable benefits in motor insurance, it is also one of the least understood.

Inflation finds new fuelHandcrafted ByOur Editors India's latest fuel price hike could trigger a wider inflation ripple across the economy, raising concerns over costlier food, deliveries, transport and growing pressure on household budgets.

Govt hikes export duty on petrol to Rs 3 per litre, cuts diesel, ATF levies from May 16The differential taxation strategy is expected to boost government revenue from petroleum exports without affecting price stability for Indian consumers.

Fuel price hike right move, oil firms can't absorb loss for long period: Ashok LahiriIn an exclusive interview with India Today, Dr Ashok Lahiri, the newly appointed Vice-Chairman of NITI Aayog, discussed the recent fuel price hikes, the state of the Indian economy, and the impact of the West Asia conflict.
Sensex, Nifty slip as rupee hits record lowThe benchmark BSE Sensex fell 160.73 points, or 0.21%, to close at 75,237.99, while the NSE Nifty50 slipped 46.10 points, or 0.19%, to settle at 23,643.50.

Reliance-Disney's JioStar sues Zee over alleged unauthorised film broadcasts: ReportJioStar has moved against Zee over alleged unauthorised telecasts of 12 Bollywood films. The clash adds to a widening rights battle between two major media companies.

Maharashtra cuts VAT on jet fuel from 18% to 7% amid rising aviation costsFuel is one of the biggest expenses for airlines and accounts for nearly 35-40% of an airline's operating costs. The tax reduction is expected to lower refuelling costs at Mumbai airport, which is India's second-busiest airport after Delhi and handles around 15% of the country's air traffic.

Petrol, diesel prices could rise over next 3-4 months amid crude oil crisisThe Rs 3-per-litre fuel price hike may not be the last, with analysts warning that persistently high crude oil prices could trigger more petrol and diesel price increases over coming three to four months.
Rupee hits all-time low, breaches 96 for 1st time against US dollarThe rupee weakened 0.3% to 96.05 against the dollar, crossing its previous all-time low of 95.9575 touched in the previous session.

HPCL dealers allege pressure to push 'Power Petrol' amid fuel price hikePetrol dealers have alleged that state-run oil firms are pressuring them to prioritise premium fuel orders amid a fresh Rs 3 per litre hike. The claim has added to concerns over consumer choice and retail fuel availability during the West Asia-linked energy crisis.

Beyond the petrol pump: How higher fuel prices could hit India's economyThe Rs 3-per-litre petrol and diesel price hike may only be the start of a new cycle of fuel price increases as crude oil prices remain high, with economists warning of wider pressure on inflation, growth, household budgets and the rupee

Petrol, diesel prices hiked after years. Here's what else could get costlierRising petrol and diesel prices are starting to push up transport and household costs across India. Economists say the impact could spread to food, deliveries, air travel and inflation if crude stays high.
Sensex, Nifty open higher despite rise in fuel prices; IT stocks lead gainsThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 292.55 points to 75,691.27, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 83.70 points to 23,773.30 as of 9:34 am.

Fuel costlier by Rs 3 per litre: Why government raised petrol, diesel pricesThe government and state-run oil companies raised petrol and diesel prices by Rs 3 per litre on Friday after keeping rates unchanged for weeks.

entertainment.headline: Alone and Lonely: Salman Khan shows off ripped abs, cryptic caption sparks buzz Salman Khan shared a new Instagram photo showing his toned abs while reclining on a sofa. Its caption dissecting the notions of "alone" and "lonely" made the post a talking point.

Cannes 2026: Restored Malayalam classic Amma Ariyan draws standing ovation Malayalam classic Amma Ariyan has returned to the global spotlight after its restored 4K version received a standing ovation at Cannes Film Festival. The screening has sparked renewed interest in the iconic film.

RJ Mahvash confirms India's Got Latent Season 2 appearance after Samay's invite RJ Mahvash has confirmed accepting Samay Raina's invitation to appear on India's Got Latent Season 2. She also opened up about standing by fellow creators amid controversies.

Tamil film producer K Rajan dies by suicide at 85 in Chennai Tamil film producer K Rajan died by suicide on Sunday in Chennai. His death has shocked the industry. The police are investigating the case and details are awaited. Rajan is known for films like Doubles, Aval Paavam and Ninaikatha Naaliai.

Aarti Ravi's mother says grandson faced stress during actor Ravi Mohan dispute Aarti Ravi's mother Sujatha Vijaykumar has publicly answered Ravi Mohan's allegations and said the family held back because her grandson is under stress during his Class 10 examinations. Her remarks also reject claims about medical payments, defend support for Aarti, and point to possible cybercrime action.

Are Sreeleela and cricketer Tilak Varma in a relationship? Here's what we know Speculation continues to circulate online around a possible link between Sreeleela and cricketer Tilak Varma. A source close to the matter has responded to the rumours, addressing the ongoing buzz around their alleged relationship.

Actor Vishal questions CM Vijay over giving film portfolio to Egmore MLA Rajmohan Actor Vishal questioned Chief Minister Vijay over assigning the film technology and cinematograph portfolio to Egmore MLA Rajmohan. His remarks have now triggered reactions within the film industry and political circles.

Pawri Ho Rahi Hai girl Dananeer Mobeen calls Devdas 'overrated', faces backlash Pakistani actor Dananeer Mobeen called Devdas "overrated," sparking an online debate after her comments went viral. She questioned the film's storyline, while many social media users defended the Shah Rukh Khan-starrer.

Chinmayi says Karuppu dubbing triggered memories of Vijay, Trisha's Leo controversy Chinmayi Sripada said dubbing for Karuppu brought back memories of the controversy surrounding Vijay and Trisha Krishnan's Leo. The singer revealed that she was afraid to publicly speak about dubbing for Trisha in the film.

Atlee and wife Priya reveal daughter's name, share its meaning Atlee and wife Priya Atlee have revealed their daughter's name in a new Instagram post. The couple also shared the special meaning behind the name along with a cute photo.

Splitsvilla X6 winners: Gullu, Kaira Anu lift trophy, win Rs 20 lakh prize Kushal Tanwar aka Gullu and Kaira Anu emerged as the winners of MTV Splitsvilla X6 after the grand finale aired on May 16. Hosted by Sunny Leone and Karan Kundrra, the couple took home the Rs 20 lakh cash prize.

Pati Patni Aur Woh Do box office Day 2: Comedy-drama earns Rs 13.7 crore globally Pati Patni Aur Woh Do recorded a slight jump in collections on Saturday after opening to modest numbers at the box office. The Ayushmann Khurrana-starrer has earned Rs 13.70 crore worldwide and Rs 9.75 crore nett in India in two days.

Aditi Rao Hydari makes bold Cannes 2026 appearance in neon green one-shoulder gown Aditi Rao Hydari appeared at the Cannes Film Festival 2026 in a neon metallic green gown from Tony Ward Couture's SS25 collection. The actor later shared a video from the French Riviera on Instagram, where her red carpet look drew attention online.

Pati Patni Aur Woh Do: Why Ayushmann Khurrana chucks comment, bets on all-out fun Ayushmann Khurrana's Pati Patni Aur Woh Do is the actor's self-confessed move away from his strategy of social messaging in films. Understanding why he swapped comment for comedy this time.

Katrina wishes 'pillar of strength' Vicky in birthday note, shares glimpse of son Katrina Kaif shared a personal birthday note for husband Vicky Kaushal as he turned 38 on May 16. The actor also posted family photos featuring the couple with their son, Vihaan.

Aditi Rao Hydari stuns in Chaarbagh-inspired champagne silk saree at Cannes Actor Aditi Rao Hydari made a striking Cannes 2026 appearance in a champagne silk tissue saree inspired by Chaarbagh. Her latest Instagram post has now caught fans' attention.

Mouni Roy, Suraj Nambiar reconnect on Instagram days after announcing separation Actor Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar's Instagram activity sparked fresh discussion on Saturday after the estranged couple started following each other again following their recent separation announcement. Fans are now closely tracking their online activity.

Kamal Haasan meets CM Vijay, raises six key demands of the Tamil film industry Actor-politician Kamal Haasan met Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay and raised six key demands linked to the Tamil film industry. The veteran actor also praised the new government's recent decisions.

The Wonderfools review: Park Eun-bin powers this chaotic yet fun superhero comedyRelease Date:Fri May 15, 2026 Netflix's The Wonderfools follows small-town misfits who stumble into superpowers amid Y2K panic. Park Eun-bin's assured performance gives the show's chaos enough heart to outweigh its uneven pacing.

general news.headline: Clock is ticking, there won't be anything left of them: Trump's latest warning to IranDonald Trump issued warning just hours after Iranian media revealed what it described as the US's core conditions for resuming negotiations.

CM-elect announces Kerala Cabinet, 21 ministers to take oath tomorrowVD Satheesan unveiled the 21-member Cabinet and said the full UDF ministry would take oath at 10 am on Monday. He said the list balanced social and regional representation, with portfolio talks almost complete.

Uranium cap, sanction relief and more: US, Iran list 5:5 hardline truce termsThe US has demanded Tehran to hand over 400 kilograms of highly enriched uranium, keep only one nuclear facility operational and accept that no American compensation would be paid for war damage caused during the conflict.

Actor Vishal questions CM Vijay over giving film portfolio to Egmore MLA RajmohanActor Vishal questioned Chief Minister Vijay over assigning the film technology and cinematograph portfolio to Egmore MLA Rajmohan. His remarks have now triggered reactions within the film industry and political circles.

I am a victim of exam paper leak. And I saw it crush a train-full of dreamsThe NEET-UG 2026 paper leak has pushed lakhs of aspirants back into uncertainty, anxiety and another cycle of mental marathon, which they thought had ended on May 3. This story is about the human cost that question paper leaks, NEET and beyond, extracts from aspirants and their families.

Indian worker killed, 3 injured in massive Ukrainian drone attack on RussiaThe Indian Embassy in Russia confirmed the death after its officials visited the site of the attack and met the injured workers at a hospital. The condition of the injured workers was not immediately known.

North India will be on fire on Monday, South, East and West to witness rainThe IMD has issued heat wave warnings for Delhi, Punjab, Haryana and Rajasthan on May 18, with temperatures expected to touch 45 degrees Celsius in the capital.

Massive fire breaks out in Rajdhani Express near Ratlam, probe orderedThe guard of Thiruvananthapuram-Hazrat Nizamuddin Rajdhani Express first noticed flames emerging from the compartment and alerted the loco pilot, following which the train was stopped and passengers were evacuated.

India adds new punch to its missile-rocket force with back-to-back testsA series of tests that India carried out in May bring focus to a maturing rocket and missile force that is trying to hit farther, strike smarter and eventually fly faster than ever before. Let's have a look at the tests of the LR-AShM, TARA, Agni MIRV and the scramjet combuster.

CBSE Class 12 result row: AI not used in evaluation, says boardAs questions over the accuracy of CBSE Class 12 board results intensify, School Education and Literacy Secretary Sanjay Kumar addressed the growing controversy around CBSE's newly introduced On-Screen Marking (OSM) system.

RJ Mahvash confirms India's Got Latent Season 2 appearance after Samay's inviteRJ Mahvash has confirmed accepting Samay Raina's invitation to appear on India's Got Latent Season 2. She also opened up about standing by fellow creators amid controversies.

Worked hard for 30 years: Indian eatery owner ordered to leave Japan, breaks downAn Indian restaurant owner in Japan has been ordered to leave the country after authorities rejected his business manager visa renewal, forcing him to shut down a restaurant he has operated for 18 years.

No fusion, no gown: Aditi Rao Hydari, Huma Qureshi bring classic sarees to CannesAditi Rao Hydari and Huma Qureshi chose traditional sarees for their Cannes appearances. Their classic drapes stood out amid the festival's recent run of experimental interpretations.

Gangraped for years, blackmailed: 2 Rajasthan sisters die by suicide within weeksPolice arrested two men in Jodhpur after allegations of sexual assault and blackmail involving two sisters. The case has triggered protests and scrutiny over alleged police inaction after both women died by suicide.

Tamil Nadu is in the family way again — the Santiago Martin family wayLottery King Santiago Martin has achieved what few business families can manage — becoming the quiet constant across India's political landscape. He worked it out pretty early that a family that whispers in every political ear — and lines all pockets — holds a leverage that no single dynasty can match.

Another batch of 'jihadi' drug seized from Dehradun, 2 including Syrian arrestedThe NCB said a Syrian suspect led investigators to a Dehradun factory allegedly used to make Captagon. The raid under Operation RAZEPILL led to a 227.2 kg seizure, two arrests and a wider probe.

Video: Chaos at Maharashtra petrol pump as fuel shortage triggers violent clashHundreds gathered at a Washim petrol pump after a fuel tanker arrived, leading to fights over petrol and diesel. The dealer later rationed sales and warned operators may rethink supplies without adequate protection.
Question Time: Weekly News QuizThink you read the headlines this week? Let's test that!

Are Sreeleela and cricketer Tilak Varma in a relationship? Here's what we knowSpeculation continues to circulate online around a possible link between Sreeleela and cricketer Tilak Varma. A source close to the matter has responded to the rumours, addressing the ongoing buzz around their alleged relationship.

'Donald Trump' buffalo in Bangladesh draws selfies, crowds and laughsTwo albino buffaloes nicknamed after Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu are drawing crowds at farms near Dhaka ahead of Eid al-Adha.

Cricket pitch-sized asteroid to approach Earth on Monday. Are we safe?A small asteroid called 2026 JH2, roughly the width of a cricket pitch, will fly past Earth on May 18, 2026, at a distance closer than the Moon. Here is everything you need to know about the spectacular close encounter.

Tamil Nadu is different: Pawan Kalyan on comparisons with Vijay's political risePawan Kalyan told Jana Sena workers that comparisons with Vijay's rise in Tamil Nadu were misplaced. He said the party's alliance with the TDP and BJP was shaped by Andhra Pradesh's political circumstances and the need for stability.

Live: Sweden confers Royal Order of Polar Star on PM Modi, 31st global honourPM Modi Five-Nation Tour Live Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, who is currently on an official trip to the Netherlands, met Dutch King Willem-Alexander and Queen Maxima in The Hague on Saturday. Key bilateral discussions during the visit are expected to focus on technology, semiconductors, defence, renewable energy, and trade. The PM also interacted with members of the Indian diaspora. He is also set to interact with key Dutch business executives. To catch all the live updates, follow Indiatoday.in

Virgin girl's silence is consent: Taliban legalises child marriage in AfghanistanThe Taliban has published a new family law in Afghanistan covering marriage, divorce and child marriage. Rights advocates say the rules deepen concerns over consent and women's autonomy under Taliban rule.

sports.headline: Bruno Fernandes equals Premier League record as Man Utd win VAR-marred clash Bruno Fernandes matched the Premier League assist record as Manchester United beat Nottingham Forest 3-2 at Old Trafford. The win kept United third, but a prolonged VAR handball call dominated the fallout.

Punjab's IPL season did not derail due to off-field controversies: Bowling coach Punjab Kings are on the brink of being eliminated from the IPL 2026 playoffs race. Punjab have endured a difficult time on and off the field, resulting in a horror performance in the second half this season.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi rewrites IPL record books with six-sitting feat IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hit his 43rd six of the season during Rajasthan Royals' match against Delhi Capitals. At 15, he has reset the Indian benchmark and moved within sight of Chris Gayle's overall IPL record.

Punjab Kings in freefall after 6 defeats in a row. Can they still reach playoffs? IPL 2026, PBKS vs RCB: Shreyas Iyer's Punjab Kings lost to Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday, May 17 at the HPCA Stadium in Dharamsala and are now in serious trouble as far as qualifying for the playoffs is concerned.

RCB storm into playoffs as Punjab Kings complete beyond-believable fall in Himachal IPL 2026, PBKS vs RCB: Punjab Kings suffered their sixth straight defeat as the Himachal escape offered them no relief. Fifties from Virat Kohli and Venkatesh Iyer propelled RCB into the playoffs after the tourists sealed a 23-run win in Dharamsala on Sunday.

Grown men reduced to tears after Hearts break on final-day of Scottish league Hearts lost the Scottish Premiership title 3-1 to Celtic after a late collapse at Parkhead. The defeat ended a 226-day stay on top and preserved the old order in Scottish football.

Bangladesh tighten grip in Sylhet Test, Pakistan struggle despite Babar Azam resistance BAN vs PAK, 2nd Test: Bangladesh have taken a lead of 156 runs in Sylhet after Mahmudul Hasan Joy scored a sparkling century. Pakistan had conceded a lead of 46 runs despite Babar Azam's quickfire 68.

Did KKR field injured Varun Chakravarthy vs GT to keep playoff hopes alive? IPL 2026: Varun Chakravarthy's suspected foot fracture has put Kolkata Knight Riders and the BCCI in direct focus. The episode has sharpened questions over franchise workload, medical oversight and India's T20 plans.

Ravi Shastri urges BCCI to fast-track Vaibhav Sooryavanshi into India setup Ravi Shastri has urged India's selectors to move quickly on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after the teenager's IPL surge. With an India A call-up already secured, the Ireland route now looks like a credible fast-track.

500 and counting: Virat Kohli's consistency in unmatched, extends his IPL record PBKS vs RCB: Virat Kohli has registered another 500-run IPL season, extending his record. The feat highlights his sustained consistency in the tournament.

Why is RCB captain Rajat Patidar not playing against PBKS in Dharamshala?IPL 2026: Rajat Patidar did not take the field for Royal Challengers Bengaluru against Punjab Kings in Dharamshala, with Jitesh Sharma stepping in for the toss and Suash Sharma replacing himas an impact substitute.

Sunil Narine, the greatest player in IPL history: Ambati Rayudu makes bold claimAmbati Rayudu called Sunil Narine the greatest player in IPL history after KKR's win over Gujarat Titans. Sanjay Bangar backed the view as Narine marked his 200th match with another decisive spell.

Xabi Alonso announced as new Chelsea manager, to take charge from July 1Chelsea have appointed Xabi Alonso as manager on a four-year contract from July 1, 2026. The move comes after FA Cup final pain and a season that leaves them outside Europe.

Thailand Open: Satwik and Chirag's title drought continues with final heartbreakSatwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty lost 12-21, 23-25 to Leo Rolly Carnando and Daniel Marthin in the Thailand Open 2026 final in Bangkok. The defeat extended the Indian pair's title drought to two years despite another run to the final.

Roland Garros: Karman Kaur Thandi aims to end India's singles Grand Slam absenceKarman Kaur Thandi could take part at Roland Garros 2026. Using a protected ranking after severe injuries dropped her to world No. 1,467, she aims to end India's Grand Slam absence by getting through the qualifying rounds.

Shubman Gill keeps Instagram game lit after KKR loss, but at GT's expenseShubman Gill mocked Gujarat Titans' fielding after their 29-run loss to Kolkata Knight Riders with an Instagram post. The joke landed because GT's dropped chances cost them heavily.

Finn Allen credits Ajinkya Rahane for turnaround to push for IPL playoffsKKR vs GT: After a brutal start to IPL 2026, Finn Allen reveals how the KKR dressing room stayed unflappable under Ajinkya Rahane's heavily criticised leadership.

Swimming by the Ram Setu: 2 Indian families search divine glory in the open seaTwo middle-class Indian families risk their savings and emotional peace to push their young children into the dangerous waters of the Palk Strait. By conquering the body of water near Ram Setu, these young swimmers choose a grueling path to build a legacy that stands out in a crowd of billions.

Thailand Open 2026 Final highlights: Sat-Chi suffer heartbreakThailand Open final Highlights: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty suffered a crushing straight-games defeat to the Indonesian pair of Leo Rolly Carnando and Daniel Marthin 12-21, 23-25. This is the first time the Indian pair were beaten by these two in their career. They managed to win the last four games but tonight was a different story.

IPL Super Sunday: Playoffs race reaches boiling point in Dharamsala and DelhiIPL 2026: A Super Sunday with real consequence: Punjab Kings must beat table-toppers RCB to keep their playoff hopes alive in Dharamsala, while Rajasthan Royals look to rediscover form against a spirited Delhi Capitals side in the national capital.

Conor McGregor to make UFC return after five years, to face Max Holloway in JulyConor McGregor will return against Max Holloway at UFC 329 in Las Vegas on July 11 after nearly five years away. The bout revives an old rivalry and McGregor has already taken a jibe at his rival ahead of the clash.

Ronaldo snubs runners-up medal after AFC Champions League 2 final lossCristiano Ronaldo walked straight down the tunnel after Al Nassr lost 1-0 to Gamba Osaka in the AFC Champions League 2 final. The Portuguese superstar didn't turn up to collect the runners-up medal during the presentation.

Best to drop catches now, than in playoffs: Shubman Gill after loss vs KKRGujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill could only muster up a wry smile after the defeat against Kolkata Knight Riders on Saturday. Reacting to the four dropped catches that proved costly in the high-scoring clash, Gill said it was better for his side to have such an off day now rather than during the playoffs.

IPL Play of the Day: GT follows PBKS footsteps, forgets to catch them allIPL 2026, KKR vs GT: Gujarat Titans suffered a 30-run defeat to Kolkata Knight Riders after dropping four crucial catches that allowed KKR's batters to dominate at Eden Gardens. Despite a strong chase setup, GT's fielding lapses proved costly as their five-match winning streak came to an end and their playoff hopes went into a must-win situation.

Lack of stability in batting line-up cost us, admits Delhi Capitals coach Ian bellIPL 2026: Ian Bell said Delhi Capitals' unstable batting has undermined their IPL 2026 campaign despite KL Rahul's prolific season. With two must-win games left, he wants stronger support for Rahul and a late lift from Axar Patel.

Litton Das century rescues Bangladesh after Pakistan pace attack burstLitton Das struck a brilliant counterattacking century as Bangladesh recovered from early trouble to post 278 in the first innings of the second Test against Pakistan. The visitors, however, still ended Day 1 in control after a disciplined bowling performance.

Sunil Narine, Finn Allen complicate Gujarat Titans' playoff chancesGujarat Titans came to Kolkata hoping to make it to the playoffs against 8th placed KKR. Instead, they fumbled multiple catches and ended up losing the game by 30 runs.

Manchester City beat Chelsea 1-0 to lift 8th FA Cup amid Premier League pushManchester City beat Chelsea 1-0 in the FA Cup final, with Antoine Semenyo scoring the decisive goal. The win secured a cup double and extended Chelsea's run of final defeats.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
